ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Opere del Signor cavalier Giovan Battista Manzini
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: cioè Il servir negato al savio; De i furori della gioventù essercitii retthorici parte prima; De i furori della gioventù essercitii retthorici parte seconda; La peripetia di Fortuna overo della caduta di Seiano; Vita di San Eustachio martire; Il Cretideo
ItacWorkItem.Notes: For a comment on the three discourses see Gian Luigi Betti `L`Accademia bolognese della Notte e alcuni discorsi di Giovan Battista Manzini` in Strenna storica bolognese 52 (2002) pp. 49-62. The three discourses along with several others were translated in French, see Les Harangues ou discours academique de Iean Baptiste Manzini transl. Scudery A Paris chez Nicolas le Gras au troisiéme Pillier de la grand` Salle du Palais à L[a] Couronnée. 1659. British Library shelfmark 12301.aa.10. A second edition was printed by Jacques Cottin au Palais au cinquiéme Pilier de la grand` Salle à l`Ecu de France 1670. Avec permission. British Library shelfmark 12301.aaa.3.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: D. Homobonus de Bonis Poenit. Pro eminentiss. Et reverendiss. D. card. Archiepisc. Bonon. | Imprimatur | Fr. Hieronym. Onuphrius doctor collegiatus et santciss. Inquisitionis consultor pro reverendiss. P. Inquisitor Bonon.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
